title: No Vex
description: A simple datapack/mod that kills vexes every tick. Makes raids and woodland mansions less annoying, also lowering the chances of dying in a raid farm
body:
A simple datapack/mod that kills vexes every tick. Removes the most hated mob in the game. Makes woodland mansions and raids less annoying.

If Minecraft says this is made for a newer/older version, just ignore the warning, I tested and everything worked.

Fabric API required if using Fabric version
